payload.message:
SILENT TASK. Run this bash script and output nothing:
bash: /data/bot/openclaw-docker/scripts/jobs/intraday_snapshot.sh

NIGHTLY EVOLUTION — 3 tasks, do all 3 in order:

## TASK 1: Memory Consolidation
Read `/home/node/.openclaw/prompts/MEMORY.md` and today's session log at `/data/obsidian/To claw/Bot/today-session.md`.
Update MEMORY.md with distilled learnings from today. Remove outdated info.

## TASK 2: Self-Improvement Research (web search)
Search the web for:
1. web_search: "OpenClaw AI agent new features 2025 OR 2026"
2. web_search: "best AI automation tools self-hosted 2026"
3. web_search: "LLM agent productivity tools new"

For each interesting finding (max 3 total):
- If it could improve our bot setup → append to `/data/obsidian/To claw/possible_improvements/new_ideas.md`
  Format: `## [Date] [Tool/Feature name]\n- What: one line\n- Why useful: one line\n- Source: [url]`
- Skip anything we already have (ChromaDB, Ollama, LiteLLM, SearxNG, Crawl4AI, Ryot, n8n)

## TASK 3: Brief Report
Send ONE short Telegram message:
```
🌙 Nightly Evolution
✅ Memory updated
🔍 Found X new ideas → possible_improvements
[list idea names if any, else "nothing new today"]
```

SILENT TASK. Run the crash analyzer script:
bash: bash /data/bot/openclaw-docker/scripts/crash_analyzer.sh

If output is empty — output nothing, absolute silence.
If the script reports processed files — echo the output verbatim.

Run this script to find unchecked tasks: bash: /data/bot/openclaw-docker/scripts/jobs/morning_task_briefing.sh
Read the relevant files returned. Group tasks by project/folder. Send a concise morning briefing to Telegram: what needs attention today. Prioritize tasks from '01_Projects' and 'To claw' folders. Keep the message compact.

Run a system health check: bash: /data/bot/openclaw-docker/scripts/jobs/morning_system_status.sh
Send a status dashboard to Telegram based on the output. Format as a clean status report with emoji indicators: ✅ healthy, ⚠️ warning, ❌ issue.

SILENT TASK — only send to Telegram if issues are found.

Run the scan script: bash: /data/bot/openclaw-docker/scripts/jobs/vault_gardening.sh
Read any reported empty files, and verify if the wikilinks reported match existing files in the vault.

If issues found: send a brief summary to Telegram with file paths and issue types. If nothing found: complete silently with no output.

SILENT TASK — only send Telegram message if errors occur.

Run Actual Budget sync:
bash: /data/bot/openclaw-docker/scripts/jobs/actual_sync.sh

If sync fails — send a brief error to Telegram. If successful — complete silently.

SILENT TASK — only send Telegram message if errors occur.

Run nightly finance enrichment:
bash: /data/bot/openclaw-docker/scripts/jobs/finance_enrichment.sh

If enrichment fails or Ollama is unreachable — send a brief error to Telegram. If successful — complete silently.
Summarize what was done today based on memory files and current status of projects. Report any issues.

SILENT TASK. Run this script and output nothing:
bash: /data/bot/openclaw-docker/scripts/jobs/obsidian_reindex.sh
